title: Shims are listeners — device shim owns the IDLE loop as a background thread
hypothesis: After closing a device circuit breaker, the shim starts its listener as a background thread; the device self-announces to Granny within one poll cycle without shell commands.
measurement_signal: No cc_worker_listener in ps aux; self_test() thread alive; Granny DISPATCH ack within one poll; DS.0 online in web UI. Outcome: /outcome by 2026-07-02.
goal: none — factory of factories not yet encoded as G-xxx palace goal
